message:
feat(hook): integrate celebration UI and profile detection

Enhances the compilation hook with celebration displays and improved
build profile detection.

hook.rs changes:
- Added detect_target_label() for inferring build profile from output
- detect_profile_from_output() parses "Finished \`profile\`" lines
- extract_profile_flag() extracts --profile and --release flags
- Import celebration types (ArtifactSummary, CelebrationSummary, etc.)
- CompilationResult now tracks crates_compiled and warnings count
- Celebration summary shown after successful builds

commands.rs changes:
- Updated command classification to support new profile detection
- Improved integration with celebration display system

These changes provide users with more feedback about what was built
and how, making the remote compilation experience more informative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
